data.name: Sexy Crush - Seduction in motion
data.detailed_description:
Sexy Crush: Seduction in Motion is a real-time match-3 puzzle game that challenges both your speed and strategy.

Move jewel-shaped puzzle blocks to align three or more of the same shape horizontally or vertically — and watch them disappear! Master quick moves and clever combos to achieve your stage goals.

Unlike traditional match-3 games, Sexy Crush introduces a real-time system that adds an exciting layer of urgency and thrill. You must clear stages by meeting specific objectives within a strict time limit — no endless thinking allowed!

💎 Game Modes

1) 100 Stage Time Attack: Clear 100 challenging stages as fast as you can before time runs out.

2) Break the AI Record: Beat the clear times set by AI-controlled players — a true test of skill and speed.

Unlock stunning photos and videos as you progress, revealing hidden rewards for the fastest and most strategic players.

Are you ready to experience puzzle seduction in motion?

data.short_description: Experience Sexy Crush: Seduction in Motion, a real-time match-3 game where speed and strategy matter. Match jewels to clear lines and unlock stunning photos and videos as rewards for fast, clever play.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: windows 10/11
  • 處理器: i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nvidia GT1030
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: realtek
